projects.archive_confirm: This action will make it inactive and remove it from active lists.
projects.archive_description: Archiving this project will make it inactive and remove it from active lists. All data will be preserved and can be restored at any time.
projects.descripton_placeholder: Describe the goal of this project…
projects.edit_description: Modify the project details, status and visibility.
projects.members_add_description: Choose members to add to this project.
projects.new_description: Create a new project to organize work, assign responsibilities, and track progress within your organization.
projects.private_description: Only project members and organization admins can see this project
projects.public_description: All organization members can see this project
projects.remove_confirm: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
projects.remove_description: Deleting is permanent and cannot be undone. All tasks, members, files, comments, activity logs, and other associated data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
projects.restore_message: Project {projectName} will be moved back to active projects.
